resources.string: Watching for idle time. Tap to open settings.
Screen was locked — tap to allow capture again so the blackhole can keep running

• Overlay, notifications, and accessibility are required.
• Secure / DRM screens (banking, Netflix, etc.) may appear black.
• Android only — iOS is not supported.
• If the feature is ON, it keeps running after screen off/on and after you leave the app.
All permissions ready. Feature can run in background.
Grant all permissions, then turn the feature ON.
Detects touch and input across apps so the blackhole can appear after idle time and dismiss on interaction.
Follow these steps to turn on idle detection. Screenshots are from a Samsung phone; other devices look similar.
Open Settings → Accessibility, then tap Installed apps.
In the installed apps list, find and tap Blackhole Screensaver. It may show as Off / Not in use.
Turn on the top switch (In use / On). Confirm if the system asks. Then return to this app and turn the feature ON.
I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy

Blackhole Screensaver (“the App”) provides an idle blackhole overlay effect on Android.

1. Controller
This App processes information on your device for the features below. There is no account/login, and we do not operate a server that collects personal data for this App.

2. Information we process
• App settings stored only on your device (ON/OFF, idle seconds, privacy consent)
• Touch/input events used only to measure idle time (via Accessibility, when you enable it)
• Screen snapshots used only to draw the blackhole distortion overlay (processed on-device; not uploaded)
• Notification status for the foreground service

3. Purpose
• Detect idle time and show/dismiss the blackhole overlay
• Keep the feature running in the background when you turn it ON
• Remember that you agreed to this policy on this device

4. Storage and retention
Settings and consent are stored in the App’s local storage on your device. Uninstalling the App deletes them. Screen snapshots are used temporarily for the effect and are not kept as a gallery album.

5. Sharing
We do not sell personal information. We do not send screen contents or input logs to our servers. System/OS vendors may process data under their own policies when you use Android features.

6. Permissions
• Display over other apps: show the blackhole overlay
• Notifications: keep the background service visible
• Accessibility: idle detection and on-device screenshots for the effect
You can revoke these anytime in system settings.

7. Children
The App is not directed at children under 13 (or the equivalent age in your region).

8. Your choices
You may refuse permissions or uninstall the App. Without required permissions, the feature cannot run.

9. Contact
For privacy questions about this App, contact the developer through the store listing contact channel.

10. Changes
We may update this policy. The “Last updated” date above will change when we do.
